TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tadren daren imaza i pasavalangaw a navalj, a i viri ciul djinfung, a i kacedasan ljaqedi daibu itua kacedas pasa navalj secevung tua taipinyang a ljavek, pasamaza ledepan kicencen ta i akaw a kuljaljaw, kasuga, sisigu, a i navalj kicaing tua i akaw a sinevaudjan. a caucau izua tu 3422 (2023 a caviljan 10 a qiljasan), tjalja kerian imaza i pasataitu a caucau a guan. a kadjunangan i pasamaza i vecekadan a gadu navalj, i kavulungan pasa navalj, siva puluq pasasuiday sedjelj a gadugadu calisian, kedri a kazatjan, izua pangwi a pana, alungic a pana, djanau a pana, a kalevelevan semezan tu kemaledeledev. a i guan a taqinaljan paiwan a kacalisian, a remacevan a sengsengan, a kai pinaiwanan. paljavak tua kadjunangan unem a mula katua lima puluq sa unem a talingan: taipang a mula: tjuwavanaq a qinaljan katua larepaq a qinaljan au i 1951 a caviljan teveljem anga setjuwaqau a pasamaza. tjuabar a mula: tjuabar a qinaljan katua tjuwavangas . aza palivengai a qinaljan katua mapulu a setjaliling a qunaljan katua kinavaliyan a qinaljan kemasi 1951 a caviljan mata 1955 a caviljan sepakiciule tua setjuabal. sinka a mula: aza qaquvuljan a qinaljan katua tjivavau a qinaljan katua kuaran a qinaljan kemasi 1951 a caviljan mata 1955 a caviljan teveljem anga se tjukakuljai a pasamaza. alui a mula: aljungic a qinaljan. murinaga a mula: mapulu a tjalilig a qinaljan katua kinavaliyan a qinaljan lemindjelj kemasi 1951 caviljan mata 1955 a caviljan. ljupetje a mula: mapulu a tjuabal a qinaljan lemindjelj ka 1955 a caviljan. aza i tjuwavangas a caucau naljiteku mamaza i sinka katua i tjuabar, au namatupang a se tjuwavangas a caucau avananga za i sinku (izua malji a siqivuan dralendren śĖįŤąąÁ§ĺ aya). cinalivatan daren na paiwan a guan ka cin a djiday anan na alangwi a kinaizuanan, a tjaljaqazavan a qinaljan avan za tucu aljungic. ka ripun a djiday, aza ripun cineviqe a taren tu lima a qinaljan: tjuabar, taiban,mulinaka, sinka, aljungic. au taiduting taiduciting kata taiducin djemadjas sa pizua ta gimeng a kanri tua pakata qinaljan a kakudan, kicaquan, sikic, asi pakakudan na i qinaljan a sengesengan kau kamasan kukuming siveciqe tua valangaw daibu. 1946 a caviljan kemasi taibu a kitjuwaya a kanri tazua a kinsihu a kamakama mavalung pavalitan tu "Ś§ßšĽĀťĄČ". lja tikiluanan kata se taibu ika matjatjaula a niamadju a capilj. ljakua a qinaljan na pupacugan a caucau ikaui kisusu. aicu "Ś§ß" ika mapualang matu naka mali. ika maqati a kitjuaya. au tazua a sangasangasan a guciu kinemenem tua kai nua tia imaimanga. aza "Ś§ß" pavalitan ta "ťĀĒ", au kaiqi a taihiu maljavar, satjezen a pasa kisihu a pakeljang. aza taren maitazuanga masan taitu lima na kacalisian a guan. guciu caucau sinupuan nasidjaravacan kivangavangan racev
S.PHON: ta…Ė…ôn dar…ôn imaza i pasava…≠aŇčaw a nava é, a i viri ¶iu…≠ …Čin*uŇč, a i ka ¶…ôdasan éaq…ôdi daibu itua ka ¶…ôdas pasa nava é s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč tua taipinjaŇč a éav…ôk, pasamaza …≠…ôd…ôpan ki ¶…ôn ¶…ôn ta i akaw a ku éa éaw, kasuga, sisigu, a i nava é ki ¶aiŇč tua i akaw a sin…ôvau…Čan. a ¶au ¶au izua tu **** (**** a ¶avi éan ** a qi éasan), ¶a éa k…ôrian imaza i pasataitu a ¶au ¶au a guan. a ka…ČunaŇčan i pasamaza i v…ô ¶…ôkadan a gadu nava é, i kavu…≠uŇčan pasa nava é, siva pu…≠uq pasasuidaj s…ô…Č…ô é a gadugadu ¶a…≠isian, k…ô…Ėi a kaza ¶an, izua paŇčwi a pana, a…≠uŇči ¶ a pana, …Čanau a pana, a ka…≠…ôv…ô…≠…ôvan s…ôm…ôzan tu k…ôma…≠…ôd…ô…≠…ôd…ôv. a i guan a taqina éan paiwan a ka ¶a…≠isian, a r…ôma ¶…ôvan a s…ôŇčs…ôŇčan, a kai pinaiwanan. pa éavak tua ka…ČunaŇčan un…ôm a mu…≠a katua …≠ima pu…≠uq sa un…ôm a ta…≠iŇčan: taipaŇč a mu…≠a: ¶uwavanaq a qina éan katua …≠ar…ôpaq a qina éan au i **** a ¶avi éan t…ôv…ô é…ôm aŇča s…ô ¶uwaqau a pasamaza. ¶uabar a mu…≠a: ¶uabar a qina éan katua ¶uwavaŇčas . aza pa…≠iv…ôŇčai a qina éan katua mapu…≠u a s…ô ¶a…≠i…≠iŇč a quna éan katua kinava…≠ijan a qina éan k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan mata **** a ¶avi éan s…ôpaki ¶iu…≠…ô tua s…ô ¶uaba…≠. sinka a mu…≠a: aza qaquvu éan a qina éan katua ¶ivavau a qina éan katua kuaran a qina éan k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan mata **** a ¶avi éan t…ôv…ô é…ôm aŇča s…ô ¶ukaku éai a pasamaza. a…≠ui a mu…≠a: a éuŇči ¶ a qina éan. murinaga a mu…≠a: mapu…≠u a ¶a…≠i…≠ig a qina éan katua kinava…≠ijan a qina éan …≠…ômin…Č…ô é k…ômasi **** ¶avi éan mata **** a ¶avi éan. éup…ô ¶…ô a mu…≠a: mapu…≠u a ¶uaba…≠ a qina éan …≠…ômin…Č…ô é ka **** a ¶avi éan. aza i ¶uwavaŇčas a ¶au ¶au na éit…ôku mamaza i sinka katua i ¶uabar, au namatupaŇč a s…ô ¶uwavaŇčas a ¶au ¶au avanaŇča za i sinku (izua ma éi a siqivuan …Ėa…≠…ôn…Ė…ôn *** aja). ¶ina…≠ivatan dar…ôn na paiwan a guan ka ¶in a …Čidaj anan na a…≠aŇčwi a kinaizuanan, a ¶a éaqazavan a qina éan avan za tu ¶u a éuŇči ¶. ka ripun a …Čidaj, aza ripun ¶in…ôviq…ô a tar…ôn tu …≠ima a qina éan: ¶uabar, taiban,mu…≠inaka, sinka, a éuŇči ¶. au taidutiŇč taidu ¶itiŇč kata taidu ¶in …Č…ôma…Čas sa pizua ta gim…ôŇč a kanri tua pakata qina éan a kakudan, ki ¶aquan, siki ¶, asi pakakudan na i qina éan a s…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇčan kau kamasan kukumiŇč siv…ô ¶iq…ô tua va…≠aŇčaw daibu. **** a ¶avi éan k…ômasi taibu a ki ¶uwaja a kanri tazua a kinsihu a kamakama mava…≠uŇč pava…≠itan tu "***". éa tiki…≠uanan kata s…ô taibu ika ma ¶a ¶au…≠a a niama…Ču a ¶api é. éakua a qina éan na pupa ¶ugan a ¶au ¶au ikaui kisusu. ai ¶u "*" ika mapua…≠aŇč matu naka ma…≠i. ika maqati a ki ¶uaja. au tazua a saŇčasaŇčasan a gu ¶iu kin…ôm…ôn…ôm tua kai nua tia imaimaŇča. aza "*" pava…≠itan ta "*", au kaiqi a taihiu ma éavar, sa ¶…ôz…ôn a pasa kisihu a pak…ô éaŇč. aza tar…ôn maitazuaŇča masan taitu …≠ima na ka ¶a…≠isian a guan. gu ¶iu ¶au ¶au sinupuan nasi…Čarava ¶an kivaŇčavaŇčan ra ¶…ôv
S.FORM: Tadren daren imaza i pasavalangaw a navalj, a i viri ciul djinfung, a i kacedasan ljaqedi daibu itua kacedas pasa navalj secevung tua taipinyang a ljavek, pasamaza ledepan kicencen ta i akaw a kuljaljaw, kasuga, sisigu, a i navalj kicaing tua i akaw a sinevaudjan. a caucau izua tu 3422 (2023 a caviljan 10 a qiljasan), tjalja kerian imaza i pasataitu a caucau a guan. a kadjunangan i pasamaza i vecekadan a gadu navalj, i kavulungan pasa navalj, siva puluq pasasuiday sedjelj a gadugadu calisian, kedri a kazatjan, izua pangwi a pana, alungic a pana, djanau a pana, a kalevelevan semezan tu kemaledeledev. a i guan a taqinaljan paiwan a kacalisian, a remacevan a sengsengan, a kai pinaiwanan. paljavak tua kadjunangan unem a mula katua lima puluq sa unem a talingan: taipang a mula: a tjaljaqazavan a qinaljan avan za tucu aljungic. ka ripun a djiday, aza ripun cineviqe a taren tu lima a qinaljan: tjuabar, taiban,mulinaka, sinka, aljungic. au taiduting taiduciting kata taiducin djemadjas sa pizua ta gimeng a kanri tua pakata qinaljan a kakudan, kicaquan, sikic, asi pakakudan na i qinaljan a sengesengan kau kamasan kukuming siveciqe tua valangaw daibu. 1946 a caviljan kemasi kisusu. aicu "Ś§ß" ika mapualang matu naka mali. ika maqati a kitjuaya. au tazua a sangasangasan a guciu kinemenem tua kai nua tia imaimanga. aza "Ś§ß" pavalitan ta "ťĀĒ", au kaiqi a taihiu maljavar, satjezen a pasa kisihu a pakeljang. aza taren maitazuanga masan taitu lima na kacalisian a guan. guciu caucau sinupuan nasidjaravacan kivangavangan racev

¶aquan, siki ¶, asi pakakudan na i qina éan a s…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇčan kau kamasan kukumiŇč siv…ô ¶iq…ô tua va…≠aŇčaw daibu. **** a ¶avi éan k…ômasi taibu a ki ¶uwaja a kanri tazua a kinsihu a kamakama
